title: Suggestion to Implement 12-Hour Time Format in Monday.com Automated Emails
excerpt: The current time format in automated emails follows the 24-hour format, which can be confusing for some users who are accustomed to the 12-hour format. While the 12-hour format is available in other areas of Monday.com, …

posts.author: DaltonJD95 (Dalton Daniels)
posts.cookedHtml: The current time format in automated emails follows the 24-hour format, which can be confusing for some users who are accustomed to the 12-hour format. While the 12-hour format is available in other areas of Monday.com, such as the World Clock, Hour, and Date columns on boards, it does not affect the time format in emails. Therefore, it would be helpful if the R&D team at Monday.com could consider making the 12-hour format an option for automated emails. This would provide more flexibility and convenience for users who prefer the 12-hour format.
